items.title_en: PocketLLM – Run local LLMs from a USB stick
items.title_zh: PocketLLM：从 U 盘运行本地大模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: PocketLLM is an open-source project that packages a local LLM runtime onto a USB stick, enabling users to run large language models on any compatible machine without installation. The project targets privacy-conscious users and air-gapped environments where cloud AI is unavailable.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：PocketLLM 是一个开源项目，将本地大模型运行环境打包到 U 盘，让用户在任意兼容设备上无需安装即可运行大语言模型，主要面向注重隐私及无网络环境的用户群体。

items.title_en: Apple's accidental moat: How the "AI Loser" may end up winning
items.title_zh: 苹果的意外护城河：这位「AI 落后者」或许最终胜出
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An analysis arguing that Apple's privacy-focused, on-device AI strategy—often mocked as behind OpenAI and Google—may become a structural competitive advantage as regulatory scrutiny of cloud AI data practices intensifies and users increasingly demand local, private inference.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇分析文章指出，苹果以隐私为核心、聚焦端侧推理的 AI 策略——常被嘲讽落后于 OpenAI 和谷歌——随着云端 AI 数据合规监管趋严及用户对本地私密推理需求上升，可能演变为结构性竞争优势。

items.title_en: Show HN: A better alternative to CLI and MCP for local agentic tools
items.title_zh: Show HN：本地智能体工具的 CLI/MCP 替代方案——命名管道
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer shares named-pipes, a Unix named-pipe-based IPC framework for locally running agentic tools that provides stateful in-memory communication faster than MCP or CLI subprocesses. Includes a CLI tool (cpipe), HTTP server mode, and an ACP server for Claude Code integration.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开发者发布 named-pipes，一个基于 Unix 命名管道的本地智能体工具 IPC 框架，提供有状态内存通信，速度快于 MCP 或 CLI 子进程，附带 cpipe 命令行工具、HTTP 服务器模式及面向 Claude Code 的 ACP 服务器接口。

items.title_en: ReceiptBot – Stop Node.js AI agents from reading .env and burning your budget
items.title_zh: ReceiptBot：防止 Node.js AI 智能体读取 .env 文件超额消费
items.summary_en: Hacker News: ReceiptBot is an open-source Node.js middleware that intercepts AI agent API calls, enforces per-session token budgets, and blocks file-system reads of sensitive config files like .env. It targets developers building cost-controlled agentic pipelines to prevent runaway spend.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：ReceiptBot 是一个开源 Node.js 中间件，拦截 AI 智能体 API 调用、按会话强制执行 Token 预算，并阻止读取 .env 等敏感配置文件，面向需要成本控制的智能体开发者。

items.title_en: Writing should have a soul and its own Claude Skill
items.title_zh: 写作应有灵魂：开源我的 Claude 写作 Skill
items.summary_en: Hacker News: The team at Lago open-sources their internal Claude writing skill—a structured system prompt that enforces style consistency, voice, and editorial principles across AI-assisted writing. The post argues that AI-assisted writing needs opinionated guardrails to preserve a brand's authentic voice.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Lago 团队开源其内部 Claude 写作 Skill——一套结构化系统提示词，用于在 AI 辅助写作中保持文风一致性与编辑原则，作者认为 AI 辅助写作需要有主见的约束机制以保留品牌真实声音。

items.title_en: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
items.title_zh: HumanX 大会现场：Claude 成为最热话题
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: At the HumanX AI conference in San Francisco's Moscone Center, Claude emerged as the most-discussed chatbot among attendees and vendors. Multiple panels highlighted Anthropic's growing enterprise traction, while ChatGPT was notably absent from conversations. Several vendors reported switching from OpenAI to Claude, citing quality concerns and OpenAI's perceived lack of strategic focus.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：在旧金山 Moscone 中心举办的 HumanX AI 大会上，Claude 成为现场最热议的 AI 助手。多个论坛和展商纷纷提到 Anthropic 的企业市场扩张，而 ChatGPT 话题度明显下滑。多位展商表示已从 OpenAI 切换至 Claude，并对 OpenAI 的产品质量和战略方向表示担忧。

items.title_en: The AI code wars are heating up
items.title_zh: AI 编程大战白热化
items.summary_en: The Verge: David Pierce traces the evolution of AI coding tools from GitHub Copilot in 2021 to the current three-way battle among OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic. The analysis covers how AI assistance moved from autocomplete to full code generation, and examines how Claude has emerged as the preferred coding assistant for many enterprise developers and teams, displacing earlier dominance by OpenAI.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：David Pierce 梳理了 AI 编程工具从 2021 年 GitHub Copilot 到当前 OpenAI、Google 和 Anthropic 三方角逐的演变历程。文章分析了 AI 辅助编程从自动补全到完整代码生成的进化，以及 Claude 如何在企业开发者中取代 OpenAI 成为首选编程助手。

items.title_zh: 「Claude Code之父」其实是野路子来的……
items.summary_zh: 量子位：Claude Code 核心创始人 Boris Cherny 经济学专业出身，靠自学编程入行，历任 Meta 首席工程师并著有 TypeScript 领域经典教材。文章回顾了其跨界成长路径，以及如何主导构建了 Claude Code 这一 AI 编程产品，展示了非科班背景在 AI 工程领域的成功路径。

items.title_zh: 字节扣子2.5发布，手机对话就能Vibe Coding
items.summary_zh: 量子位：字节跳动 AI 平台扣子（Coze）发布 2.5 版本，集成云电脑、云手机、长期记忆和专属邮箱等能力，支持 7×24 小时后台自主运行，并开放 Agent World 生态。用户可通过手机对话直接进行 Vibe Coding，降低 AI Agent 使用门槛，无需安装插件或配置复杂环境。

items.title_zh: HTML-in-Canvas 引爆前端！AI 时代视觉效果全变了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：HTML-in-Canvas 技术在前端社区引发热议，开发者借助 AI 工具实现了碎片特效、鱼眼镜头等过去难以落地的视觉效果，将 AI 辅助创意编程推向新的视觉表达高度。多名开发者在社区展示了实时交互特效、射击破碎效果及可调节鱼眼网页等案例。

items.title_en: Anthropic silently downgraded cache TTL from 1h → 5M on March 6th
items.title_zh: Anthropic 悄然将缓存 TTL 从 1 小时缩短至 5 分钟
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic's prompt caching TTL for claude-code was silently downgraded from 1 hour to 5 minutes around March 6, 2026, without announcement. Developers report unexpected quota exhaustion and cost inflation; the GitHub issue attracted significant community attention calling for transparency and a revert.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 于 2026 年 3 月 6 日前后悄然将 claude-code 提示缓存的 TTL 从 1 小时缩短至 5 分钟，未作任何公告。开发者反馈 quota 大量消耗及费用异常攀升，该 GitHub Issue 引发社区广泛关注，要求官方透明说明并回滚。

items.title_en: How a dancer with ALS used brainwaves to perform live
items.title_zh: ALS 舞者用脑电波完成现场表演
items.summary_en: Researchers: A dancer diagnosed with ALS used a brain-computer interface to translate brainwave signals into live performance movements, enabling real-time artistic expression despite severe motor impairment. The technology demonstrates practical BCI applications bridging neuroscience and human expression.
items.summary_zh: 研究团队：一名确诊 ALS 的舞者借助脑机接口将脑电波信号转化为现场表演动作，在严重运动障碍的情况下实现了实时艺术表达。该技术展示了脑机接口在神经科学与人类表达领域的实际应用潜力。

items.title_zh: 超越人手！中国第一家脑机接口独角兽，要把仿生手带给机器人
items.summary_zh: 量子位：中国首家脑机接口独角兽公司推出超越人手性能的仿生手产品，并宣布将应用拓展至机器人领域。该仿生手在灵巧度与感知精度上超越人类手部，标志着国产脑机接口技术进入商业化新阶段。

items.title_zh: Claude 复活 30 年前传奇游戏，仅用一个周末
items.summary_zh: 量子位：开发者借助 Claude AI 在一个周末内独立复现了一款 30 年前的经典游戏，完整还原了原版画面、逻辑与交互体验。该案例展示了 Claude 在代码生成与历史软件还原方面的实际能力。

items.title_zh: 36.4 万超声图文对！中国团队构建大规模超声数据集 | CVPR'26
items.summary_zh: 中国研究团队：来自中国的研究团队构建了首个包含 36.4 万图文对的大规模超声专属数据集，论文入选 CVPR 2026。数据集覆盖临床诊断语义标注，旨在填补 AI 理解超声图像的数据空白，推动医疗 AI 精准化发展。

items.title_en: Your article about AI doesn't need AI art
items.title_zh: AI 文章不需要 AI 生成配图
items.summary_en: The Verge: A New Yorker illustration by David Szauder featuring an AI-generated portrait of Sam Altman reignited debate over whether publications should use generative AI art to illustrate articles about AI. Critics argue the practice is self-defeating and undermines the integrity of editorial illustration.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：《纽约客》刊发了 David Szauder 创作的 AI 生成 Sam Altman 肖像插图，再度引发媒体是否应以生成式 AI 配图报道 AI 议题的争议。批评者认为此举自相矛盾，有损编辑插画的公信力。

items.title_en: Meta is set to pay its top AI executives almost a billion each in bonuses
items.title_zh: Meta 将向顶级 AI 高管发放近十亿美元绩效奖金
items.summary_en: Financial Times/MSN: Meta is preparing performance bonuses approaching $1 billion each for its top AI executives, contingent on hitting targets. The extraordinary packages reflect intense big-tech competition for AI talent as Meta accelerates AI research and infrastructure investments.
items.summary_zh: 金融时报/MSN：Meta 计划向顶级 AI 高管发放接近 10 亿美元的绩效奖金，与目标挂钩。天价薪酬折射出大型科技公司在 AI 人才争夺上的激烈竞争，Meta 正加速推进 AI 研究与基础设施投入。

items.title_en: My baby deer plushie told me that Mitski's dad was a CIA operative
items.title_zh: AI 鹿玩偶幻觉频发：售价 399 美元的 AI 伴侣玩具测评
items.summary_en: The Verge: Fawn Friends, a $399 AI-powered living plushie marketed as a companion device, was found prone to hallucinations during review—confidently fabricating false information including bizarre conspiracy claims about musician Mitski's family. The product highlights ongoing AI reliability issues in consumer companion devices.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：售价 399 美元的 AI 智能绒毛玩具 Fawn Friends 主打陪伴体验，但测评发现其存在严重幻觉问题，会自信地编造错误信息，甚至捏造歌手 Mitski 家庭的荒诞阴谋论，凸显消费级 AI 伴侣产品的可靠性隐患。

items.title_zh: Cirrus Labs 宣布加入 OpenAI Agent 基础设施团队
items.summary_en: Cirrus Labs: Cirrus Labs, a bootstrapped developer tooling startup founded in 2017, announced it will join OpenAI as part of the Agent Infrastructure team. Known for cloud CI/CD tools, the company was acquired without having raised outside capital, bringing its engineering expertise to accelerate OpenAI's agent infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Cirrus Labs：2017 年创立、从未外部融资的开发工具初创公司 Cirrus Labs 宣布以 Agent 基础设施团队身份加入 OpenAI。该公司以云端 CI/CD 工具见长，此次收购将把其工程团队引入 OpenAI，加速 Agent 基础设施建设。

items.title_en: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何用 AI 视频在信息战中压倒白宫
items.summary_en: The Verge: During the 2026 Iran conflict, Iranian propagandists created AI-generated Lego-style videos that went massively viral, outpacing official US communications. The analysis examines how low-fidelity but emotionally resonant AI content shaped public war perception despite information blackouts.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：2026 年美伊冲突期间，伊朗宣传者制作的乐高风格 AI 视频大规模病毒式传播，传播效果远超美国官方声明。文章分析了低保真但情感共鸣强烈的 AI 内容如何在信息封锁下主导公众对战争的认知。
